requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Angola does not appear to have a mature, widely published EV charging connector rulebook. For new internationally aligned projects, the practical direction should be treated as the IEC 62196 ecosystem unless the tender or site owner specifies otherwise: IEC 62196-2 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 62196-3 Combo 2 (CCS2) for DC fast charging. Connector conformity becomes mandatory when written into IANORQ-adopted standards, importer specifications, IRSEA / ENDE project conditions, site-owner requirements, or charge-point-operator tenders.
summary.zh: 安哥拉尚未显示出成熟且广泛公开的电动汽车充电接口规则体系。对于新的国际化项目，除非招标或场地方另有规定，实务上应按IEC 62196体系处理：交流充电采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流快充采用IEC 62196-3 Combo 2（CCS2）。当接口符合性写入IANORQ采标、进口商规范、IRSEA / ENDE项目条件、场地方要求或充电点运营商招标时，即成为强制项目要求。
summary.zht: 安哥拉尚未顯示出成熟且廣泛公開的電動汽車充電接口規則體系。對於新的國際化項目，除非招標或場地方另有規定，實務上應按IEC 62196體系處理：交流充電採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流快充採用IEC 62196-3 Combo 2（CCS2）。當接口符合性寫入IANORQ採標、進口商規範、IRSEA / ENDE項目條件、場地方要求或充電點運營商招標時，即成為強制項目要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — AC vehicle couplers, including Type 2
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, including CCS2 configuration
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IANORQ standards adoption or project specification where applicable

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC and IEC Type 2 are not interchangeable because connector gender, signaling, and contact arrangements differ. GB/T DC and CCS2 are geometrically and electrically different; GB/T DC also uses GB/T 27930 CAN communication rather than the CCS2 communication stack used in IEC-aligned deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口与IEC Type 2不能互换，因为接口性别、信号和触点排列不同。GB/T直流接口与CCS2在几何和电气层面均不同；GB/T直流还采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而非IEC体系部署中使用的CCS2通信栈。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口與IEC Type 2不能互換，因為接口性別、信號和觸點排列不同。GB/T直流接口與CCS2在幾何和電氣層面均不同；GB/T直流還採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而非IEC體系部署中使用的CCS2通訊棧。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — DC charger to BMS communication

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 Angola projects. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack, labels, temperature-rise evidence, spare parts, and test reports. Adapters should not be treated as a substitute for a project-compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于要求IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2的安哥拉项目。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈、标签、温升证据、备件和测试报告进行硬件重新设计。转接器不应被视为项目合规接口设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於要求IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2的安哥拉項目。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧、標籤、溫升證據、備件和測試報告進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不應被視為項目合規接口設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by IANORQ-adopted standards, importer specification, ENDE / IRSEA project condition, site owner, network operator, or tender; GB/T substitution is physically incompatible without hardware redesign
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a document swap. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa; confirm Type 2 / CCS2 requirements for each Angola project before quoting or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然；报价或出货前应确认每个安哥拉项目是否要求Type 2 / CCS2。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然；報價或出貨前應確認每個安哥拉項目是否要求Type 2 / CCS2。
